news.title:
Hindalco and Nalco fall over 6% as metals decline further.
Indian Rupee hits a new record low amid market volatility.

news.title: Shipwaves Online wins a 15.6M INR logistics digitalization order from Hindalco Industries.

news.title:
Novelis Inc., Hindalco's subsidiary, entered a Material Definitive Agreement involving a $225M municipal bond offering.
Hindalco disclosed this under SEBI Regulation 30; details are on Hindalco and Novelis websites.
news.summary:
Novelis Inc., Hindalco's subsidiary, entered a Material Definitive Agreement involving a $225M municipal bond offering.

news.title:
Hindalco Industries gains as West Asia conflict spikes aluminium prices globally.
Mumbai leads market rebound, key Gulf transit route closure pushes prices.
news.summary:
Hindalco Industries gains as West Asia conflict spikes aluminium prices globally.

news.title: Hindalco, Nalco stocks gain as Qatalum smelter shutdown lifts aluminium prices.
news.summary: Hindalco, Nalco stocks gain as Qatalum smelter shutdown lifts aluminium prices.

news.title:
Nalco, Hindalco, Vedanta shares may react as Qatalum halts aluminium production, raising supply concerns.
US-Iran conflict disrupts Gulf aluminium output, potentially affecting Indian producers tied to global trends.
news.summary:
Nalco, Hindalco, Vedanta shares may react as Qatalum halts aluminium production, raising supply concerns.
US-Iran conflict disrupts Gulf aluminium output, potentially affecting Indian producers tied to global trends.

news.title:
Nifty dropped 312 points, rebounding 250 points after hitting 24,600 support zone but closed below 25,000 due to geopolitical concerns.
Bharat Electronics, Hindalco gained; InterGlobe Aviation, L&T dragged indices. Bank Nifty fell 1.14%, critical support at 59,300.
news.summary:
Nifty dropped 312 points, rebounding 250 points after hitting 24,600 support zone but closed below 25,000 due to geopolitical concerns.
Bharat Electronics, Hindalco gained; InterGlobe Aviation, L&T dragged indices. Bank Nifty fell 1.14%, critical support at 59,300.

news.title:
NSE, BSE closed for Holi; trading resumes March 4, 2026.
Sensex fell 1.3%, Nifty 1.2% amid global tensions; BEL, Hindalco gained.
news.summary:
NSE, BSE closed for Holi; trading resumes March 4, 2026.
Sensex fell 1.3%, Nifty 1.2% amid global tensions; BEL, Hindalco gained.

news.title:
Jio Financial infused Rs 2,000 crore into Jio Credit for growth; HCLTech signed an MoU with IIT Kanpur for GCC solutions.
Hindalco's Aluchem deal faces US regulatory delay; NTPC, GMDC signed MoUs for coal and lignite resource utilization.
news.summary:
Jio Financial infused Rs 2,000 crore into Jio Credit for growth; HCLTech signed an MoU with IIT Kanpur for GCC solutions.
Hindalco's Aluchem deal faces US regulatory delay; NTPC, GMDC signed MoUs for coal and lignite resource utilization.

news.title:
HCLTech signed MoU with IIT Kanpur for scalable solutions; IRFC board to meet on March 9 for interim dividend.
Hindalco's US acquisition review delayed; BPCL forms Singapore subsidiary; Greaves Cotton expands to Nepal.
news.summary:
HCLTech signed MoU with IIT Kanpur for scalable solutions; IRFC board to meet on March 9 for interim dividend.
Hindalco's US acquisition review delayed; BPCL forms Singapore subsidiary; Greaves Cotton expands to Nepal.

news.title:
Hindalco's AluChem acquisition CFIUS review paused due to US govt shutdown.
Timelines tolled; no definite date for resumption. Updates upon progress.
news.summary:
Hindalco's AluChem acquisition CFIUS review paused due to US govt shutdown.

news.title:
Hindalco Industries will participate in IIFL 17th Entrepreneurial India Conference on Feb 26, 2026, in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared; Q3FY26 earnings presentation available on Hindalco's website.
news.summary:
Hindalco Industries will participate in IIFL 17th Entrepreneurial India Conference on Feb 26, 2026, in Mumbai.

news.title:
Novelis, Hindalco's subsidiary, entered a deal with AV Minerals to sell 13.3M shares.
The transaction is priced at ₹150/share, valued at ₹2B; Novelis filed Form 8-K with US SEC.
news.summary:
Novelis, Hindalco's subsidiary, entered a deal with AV Minerals to sell 13.3M shares.
The transaction is priced at ₹150/share, valued at ₹2B; Novelis filed Form 8-K with US SEC.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.
news.summary:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.

news.title:
Markets rise with major indices up 1%, Nifty50 crosses 25,650.
Hindalco, Power Grid, L&T, NTPC, and HUL lead gains with 44/50 Nifty stocks positive.
news.summary:

news.title:

Collaboration utilizes Hindalco's aluminum expertise to boost India's aerospace industry growth.

news.title:
Hindalco's Q3 FY26 transcript shows consolidated EBITDA up 6%, PAT down 45% due to exceptional items.
Safety improved with strong ESG scores, but one road fatality was reported in the quarter.
news.summary:

news.title:
Vedanta, Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel may react to US tariff rollback plans on steel, aluminium.
BHEL won LoA from SAIL for power plant; Bharti Airtel's unit got RBI nod as NBFC Type II.

news.title:
Nifty closed at 25,725, rebounding sharply to defend the 25,600 support, yet failing to breach 25,750 resistance.
Adani Enterprises, ITC, BEL gained while Hindalco, Tata Steel fell; PSU Banks, IT led sectoral gains; metals underperformed.
news.summary:
Nifty closed at 25,725, rebounding sharply to defend the 25,600 support, yet failing to breach 25,750 resistance.
Adani Enterprises, ITC, BEL gained while Hindalco, Tata Steel fell; PSU Banks, IT led sectoral gains; metals underperformed.
